announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Life Insurance Corporation Of India has informed the Exchange regarding 'Corporation has acquired 6.660% shareholding in  JIO FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD.  through demerger action by  Reliance Industries Ltd.  as per the notice by company dated 19th July 2023.'.

announcements.headline: Corp Restructuring - others
announcements.body: Life Insurance Corporation Of India has informed the Exchange about Corp Restructuring Intimation under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
